content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt claims "ad blocker", "AI-powered suggestions", and "works fully offline", but ContentView.swift (the only Swift source shown) is a plain local List/TextField task app with no networking, no ML/CoreML imports, no content-blocking extension, and no offline-sync logic.

Pierre: Apple reviewers actively test marketing claims against actual app behavior, and unsubstantiated claims like "ad blocker" or "AI-powered" trigger 2.3/2.1 rejections quickly since neither an ad-block mechanism (e.g. Safari Content Blocker extension) nor any AI/ML code (CoreML, prediction logic) appears anywhere in the codebase. Either implement these features visibly and describe them with specificity for review, or remove these claims from description.txt to match the simple to-do list functionality actually shipped.
